name: AuditLog
description: An audit management log entry recording an administrative action.

timestamp.description: Action timestamp as Unix epoch milliseconds.

actor_primary_username.description: Username of the administrator who performed the action.

sub_type.description: Action subtype (e.g., Login, Logout, Policy Update).

reason.description: Failure reason if result is FAIL.

ip.description: Source IP address of the action.
